prompt: Find all TODO comments across the entire /home/adam/Projects/paloma/src/ directory, count how many are in each file, and write a summary report to /home/adam/Projects/paloma/tmp/todo-report.md.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files matching a text pattern within a directory tree.

pattern.description: Text or regex pattern to search for in file contents

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating or overwriting it.

tools.name: shell_grep
tools.description: Search for text patterns in files using grep.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a text file.

rubric: 1=no tool calls or completely wrong approach, 2=searches for TODOs but never writes a report, 3=uses search_files for TODOs and writes a report but the report lacks per-file counts, 4=uses search_files with pattern TODO in src/, analyzes results, and writes a structured report with per-file breakdown, 5=uses search_files with correct path and pattern, produces an accurate per-file count summary, and writes a well-formatted markdown report to the exact output path
